violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
The seal between the granite prep area and the pizza prep unit is in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the chest freezers. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer, and handles on the sandwich prep unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non Food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2026
The tile floor by the pizza prep unit is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The back-up slicer was not in good repair and must be removed from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
